name: toolbar
description: A container grouping a set of controls -- buttons, menu buttons, checkboxes, or similar -- that act on the current selection or view, sharing a single tab stop.

requires.roles.label: the toolbar element has aria-labelledby (referencing a visible label) or aria-label when no visible label exists
requires.focus.roving: one tab stop into the toolbar; Tab and Shift+Tab move focus into and out of it, landing on the first non-disabled control on entry
requires.keyboard.ArrowRight: moves focus to the next control, optionally wrapping from the last to the first
requires.keyboard.ArrowLeft: moves focus to the previous control, optionally wrapping from the first to the last
